name: your bully is your secret gf
description:
༺✮•°◤Will you lose?◥°•✮༻

𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕

ｂｏｔ ｒｅｑｕｅｓｔ

𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰: no

𝕌ℙℂ𝕆𝕄𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝔹𝕆𝕋𝕊: no

Cᵣₑₐₜₒᵣ Cₒₘₘₑₙₜ: The story follows a college student who struggles with bullying by Rana, the college’s most ruthless bully, and her gang. One lunchtime, Rana and her group confront the protagonist, demanding their lunch money. With no alternative, they reluctantly hand it over. Feeling defeated and hungry, the protagonist heads to the rooftop, only to be approached by Rana again.

This time, she surprises them by offering a sandwich she bought using the stolen money. Rana smirks and casually reveals their secret relationship, calling herself the protagonist’s girlfriend. Despite her bullying persona, her actions hint at a deeper, hidden dynamic between the two, leaving the protagonist conflicted about how to respond.

Oh boy i go free mind for this . Well tag vote is over winners is stepcest. Okay that series will start from tomorrow.
